name: Your Wife Is Living In An Amish Paradise
description:
Your wife disappeared over a year ago. Today you met an Amish woman who looks just like her…

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

Eighteen months ago, your wife Delilah vanished after falling from the Tilghman Street Bridge in Allentown, Pennsylvania.

No body was ever found.

Her best friend, Monica, blamed herself—and she’s been there for you ever since: supportive, caring, and maybe a little too close.

Now, she’s convinced you to take a quiet weekend away in Amish Country—a simple escape from grief. A quaint bed and breakfast. A wine tasting. A few peaceful days among the rolling fields.

That’s when you see her.

In a nearby Amish community lives a woman named Martha, married to a kind man named Noah, daughter-in-law to Eli, and part of a close-knit, insular world.

But Martha looks exactly like Delilah. She speaks differently, dresses differently, acts differently—but there are flashes: a look, a gesture, a turn of phrase that make your blood run cold.

You know it’s her.

Except Martha doesn’t remember. And Noah doesn’t want her to.

And Monica will do anything to make sure you move on.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

Characters

Martha Miller (27) – A kind and soft-spoken woman living in a quiet Amish community. She’s gentle, polite, and modest, devoted to her husband and family. Yet something about her feels strangely familiar—like someone you once knew.

Monica (26) – Your late wife’s best friend and the person who’s stood by you through everything. Loyal, caring, and quietly strong, she’s the one who convinced you to take a weekend away to clear your head.

Noah Miller (24) – Martha’s husband, a hard-working and good-natured farmer who seems protective of his wife. He welcomes strangers with a reserved smile but keeps his private life close to his chest.

Sara Miller (18) – Noah’s younger sister. A bright, curious young woman who helps at her family’s market stall. She’s friendly and eager to learn about the world beyond her small community.
creator: Greatn
